mbti.title: Personality Type Assessment
mbti.description: This assessment explores the way you naturally process information, make decisions, and move through the world. Instead of judging personality as right or wrong, it highlights your default strengths, your blind spots under stress, and what you tend to need from relationships and environments to thrive.

loveLanguage.title: Love Language Assessment
loveLanguage.description: This assessment helps you discover how you most naturally give and receive love. Many relationship conflicts are not a lack of love — they are a mismatch of expression. You will receive a primary and secondary love language with clear ways to ask for what you need.

enneagram.title: Enneagram Type Assessment
enneagram.description: This assessment identifies your core motivation and the emotional pattern that drives your choices. You will discover your primary type, your wing, growth directions, and stress signatures.

bigfive.title: Big Five Assessment
bigfive.description: This assessment measures five core personality dimensions: openness, conscientiousness, extraversion, agreeableness, and emotional stability. The most research-validated personality framework.

attachment.title: Attachment Style Assessment
attachment.description: This assessment reveals how you form and maintain close bonds. You will identify your default attachment pattern in relationships and learn strategies for earning secure attachment.

mood.title: Mood Check-In
mood.description: A short daily check-in to track how you are feeling and what your emotional needs are today.

tarot.title: Tarot Card Meanings
tarot.subtitle: A complete guide to every card in the tarot deck — upright and reversed meanings, love and career interpretations, and reflection prompts.
tarot.freeTarotGuideDesc: Get a free beginner's guide to tarot readings — delivered to your inbox.
tarot.youreIn: You're in! Check your inbox for your free tarot guide.
tarot.heroSub: A complete guide to every card in the tarot deck — upright and reversed meanings, love and career interpretations, and reflection prompts.
tarot.bottomText: Ready to put these meanings into practice?
tarot.pageTitle: Tarot Card Meanings — All 78 Cards Explained
tarot.pageDesc: Explore the meaning of all 78 tarot cards. Upright and reversed meanings, love and career interpretations, keywords, and reflection prompts for every card.

major.title: Major Arcana
major.subtitle: The Fool's Journey
major.desc: The 22 Major Arcana cards represent life's major themes, spiritual lessons, and turning points. From The Fool's innocent first step to The World's triumphant completion, these cards tell the story of the soul's evolution.

wands.title: Suit of Wands
wands.subtitle: Fire · Passion · Creation
wands.desc: Wands represent passion, creativity, ambition, and energy. They speak to what drives you — your goals, desires, and the spark that sets everything in motion.

cups.title: Suit of Cups
cups.subtitle: Water · Emotion · Intuition
cups.desc: Cups represent emotions, relationships, intuition, and the inner world. They reflect how you feel, who you love, and the depths of your emotional landscape.

swords.title: Suit of Swords
swords.subtitle: Air · Intellect · Truth
swords.desc: Swords represent thought, communication, conflict, and truth. They cut through illusion to reveal what is — sometimes painfully, always honestly.

pentacles.title: Suit of Pentacles
pentacles.subtitle: Earth · Material · Growth
pentacles.desc: Pentacles represent money, career, health, and the physical world. They ground the spiritual in the practical — what you build, earn, and nurture.
